topics.description: 整理动作位置：list/search（含 uses: 引用查找）、move、全局页 create/reorder、虚拟进程 process ensure 批量归集。Use when tidying action pages, moving actions, or grouping by subprogram reference — not for editing steps.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_move qkrpc_profile_create qkrpc_profile_reorder qkrpc_process_ensure

topics.description: data.json steps[]：stepRunnerKey、inputParams/outputParams、ifSteps；长 inputParams.value (>4 lines) use files/ + file ref not inline value. Use before step-runner get.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data qkrpc_action_patch

topics.description: data.json 中 variables[] 的类型、defaultValue；quicker_in_param 边界。步骤参数绑定见 action-steps。Use when editing action variables.
Quicker 动作编辑 P1–P7 主流程。Use before the first action edit in a session.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_create qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_file_read workspace_file_write workspace_file_edit

topics.description: P4 首选：$=、$$ 与 sys:evalexpression（LINQ/字符串/JSON/多变量赋值）。Prefer before sys:csscript for data transforms.
P4 回退选型：须先排除 expressions/evalexpression，再考虑 sys:csscript vs runScript。Use when no dedicated step module fits after checking expressions.
Quicker 动作无头编辑总览：P0 环境、docs 工具、P0–P7 索引。Use when starting action editing or choosing which guide topic to read next.
常用 stepRunnerKey 速查表。Use before step-runner search when a known module might fit.
step-runner 目录搜索语法（OR、通配、sys:*）。Use when finding a step module key before qkrpc_step_runner_get.
公共子程序与动作内子程序的区别及调用工作流。Use when adding subprogram call steps or editing subprogram projects.
.quicker/actions workspace layout; workspace_file_* for files/; long step params via file refs; qkrpc_action_patch save. Use when editing data.json on disk.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_file_read workspace_file_write workspace_file_edit
topics.compatibility: QuickerAgent; requires working directory in sidebar
